title: Ubiquiti G6 180, UniFi Protect panoramic IP camera, 16MP, white
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Protect IP panoramic hybrid camera UVC-G6-180-W features (2) 8MP sensors (7680 x 2160 px) at 20fps delivering a 180° field of view , combined IR/white LED illumination for night vision up to 20m, IP66 and IK4 protection , built-in microphones and speaker. The camera connects to the network via 10/100Mbps LAN with PoE+ support and a maximum power consumption of 15W 16MP 180° 20fps video (7680 x 2160 px) Advanced AI detection of various objects and events Hybrid Smart illumination - - IR/LED lighting up to 20m Supports local recording to a microSD card or NAS Managed through UniFi Protect IP66 weather-resistant housing IK4 tamper resistance Power via 37-57V PoE, 802.3at PoE+ Device Wall, ceiling and pole mounts Mounting accessories
